Supervisory focus areas 2025
Supervisory focus areas 2025
18.12.24
•
Supervision and Regulation
Based on the risk analysis, the FMA has defined its supervisory priorities for the coming year.
Trends, Risiken und Aufsichtsschwerpunkte 2025
(225 kB)
In addition to the cross-sectoral supervisory priorities, the FMA also sets targeted sector-specific supervisory priorities each year, which are generally aligned with the supervisory programs and strategic guidelines of the European Supervisory Authorities. This publication focuses on the cross-sector supervisory priorities. The 2025 focus areas include crisis prevention and crisis management, the implementation of foreign sanctions, money laundering prevention and ICT security.
This content has been translated using a fully automated machine translation tool. Some content may not be accurately translated.
